info.title: Treegens Mangrove Counting API
info.description: Submit a field walkthrough video of a mangrove planting site and get back a deduplicated count of unique trees, an annotated video, and a top-down spatial map. Processing is asynchronous: submit a video, receive a job id, poll until the job is done. Counts are unique tracked trees, not per-frame detections; uncertain results are flagged for human review.

post.summary: Submit a video for a visit
post.description: Upload one video as multipart form data under the field name 'video'. Returns immediately with a job id; processing runs in the background.

parameters.name: visit_id
parameters.description: Your identifier for the site visit; echoed back on the job.

get.description: Returns the current job. While queued or running the payload is small; when done it carries the full result object. A processing failure returns 200 with status 'error', not an HTTP error.
Browser-playable H.264 mp4 with every tree boxed by stable ID and a running unique count. Available once the job is done.
Top-down PNG of the reconstructed camera path, inferred tree positions, and merged revisits. Present only when a path could be reconstructed (see result.path_image).

404.description: Missing job or no path image.

poll.description: Relative URL to poll for status.

VisitResult.description: Present on a done job under 'result'.

unique_count.description: Unique mangrove trees after all deduplication. The headline number to store.

requires_review.description: True when the count is uncertain; route to a human verifier.

count_before_correction.description: Unique track IDs before revisit and zoom correction. Always >= unique_count.

confidence.description: 0 to 1; share of counted boxes that were real detections vs interpolated fills.

naive_per_frame_sum.description: What a naive per-frame box count would report. Inflated; never a real count.

count_correction.description: What the dedup stages merged: parked_zoom, respawn, spatial, merged_total.

camera_motion.description: Advisory summary of camera behaviour: dominant_state, state_fractions, uncertain_fraction, n_zoom_segments.

camera_path.description: Reconstructed path, tree map, and n_revisits. Null when no path could be built.

gps.description: lat, lon, accuracy. Camera/site-level only, never per-tree.

metadata.description: Container metadata from ffprobe (width, height, frame rate, duration).

annotated_video.description: Relative URL of the annotated count video.

path_image.description: Relative URL of the spatial map PNG, when produced.
